# Overview
A reference file for how Import Schemas are used by the engine.

# ImportSchema.txt
The ImportSchema.txt files in each subapp directory will tell you how data is imported from official cardlist databases

## Import Schema Example
For SWUDeck, the import schema at the time of writing looks like this:

https://admin.starwarsunlimited.com/api/cards?locale=en&pagination[pageSize]=100&filters[variantOf][id][$null]=true
https://cdn.starwarsunlimited.com/
png
data
pagination[page]
meta->pagination->pageCount
title,subtitle,cardNumber:number,cost:number,hp:number,power:number,text,unique,upgradeHp:number,upgradePower:number,aspect,trait,arena,type,rarity,set

this maps to the relevant data parsed that the generated dictionaries reference.

these dictionaries come from running the zzCardCodeGenerator.php with rootName = "SWUDeck"

function Cardpower(cardID) {
  return powerData[cardID] !== undefined ? powerData[cardID] : null;
}

var textData = {"2579145458":"Action [1 resource, exhaust]: Give a Shield token to a [Heroism] unit you played this phase. ","6088773439":"Action [1 resource, exhaust]: If you played a [Villainy] card this phase, deal 1 damage to a unit and 1 damage to a base.","2524528997":"Sentinel (Units in this arena can't attack your non-Sentinel units or your base.)","3038238423":"When Played: You may attack with a unit. If it's a Rebel unit, it gets +2\/+0 for this attack.","9266336818":"When Played: Search the top 5 cards of your deck for up to 2 Imperial cards, reveal them, and draw them. (Put the other cards on the bottom of your deck in a random order.)","9680213078":"When Played: Either ready a resource or exhaust a unit.","5562575456":null,"5494760041":"Play a non-[Heroism] unit from your hand for free. Deal damage to your base equal to its cost.","0494601180":null,"3509161777":"Look at the top card of your deck. You may play it. It costs [5 resources] less. If your base has 5 or less remaining HP, you may play it for free instead.","8129465864":null,"8560666697":"Each friendly damaged unit gets +1\/+0. function Cardtext(cardID) {
  return textData[cardID] !== undefined ? textData[cardID] : null;
}

"LAW","1606988687":"LAW","6136678864":"LAW","5574828561":"LAW","6715387845":"LAW","3293298610":"LAW","5249469281":"LAW","9949055416":"LAW","2471168752":"LAW","0220114200":"LAW","2463919106":"LAW","0188366437":"LAW","1925903426":"LAW","1984654702":"LAW","7477598198":"LAW","6733770226":"LAW","2505117809":"LAW","0800992259":"LAW","3232608976":"LAW","3080000065":"LAW","0407515487":"LAW","5952331790":"LAW","9215774796":"LAW","6060294176":"LAW","4055046222":"LAW","5172213537":"LAW","3669825370":"LAW","1514592160":"LAW","6530952637":"LAW","2608322291":"LAW","0246299753":"LAW","9184481752":"LAW","6438727942":"LAW","1961735633":"LAW","8408430692":"LAW","8015500527":"LAW"};
function Cardset(cardID) {
  return setData[cardID] !== undefined ? setData[cardID] : null;
}

var setNumOffsets = {"SOR":1000,"SHD":2000,"TWI":3000,"JTL":4000,"LOF":5000,"IBH":6000,"SEC":7000,"LAW":8000};
function Cardsetnum(cardID) {
  var set = Cardset(cardID);
  if(set == null) return null;
  var offset = setNumOffsets[set];
  if(offset == null) return null;
  return offset + CardcardNumber(cardID);
}

function Cardswudb(cardID) {
  switch (Cardtype(cardID)) {
    case "Unit":
      if(Cardarena(cardID) === "Ground") {
        return "a" + Cardcost(cardID) + Cardtitle(cardID);
      } else if (Cardarena(cardID) === "Space") {
        return "b" + Cardcost(cardID) + Cardtitle(cardID);
      }
      break;
    case "Event":
      return "c" + Cardcost(cardID) + Cardtitle(cardID);
    case "Upgrade":
      return "d" + Cardcost(cardID) + Cardtitle(cardID);
    default: return "zzz";
  };
}

var allSetsData = {"SOR":0,"SHD":1,"TWI":2,"JTL":3,"LOF":4,"SEC":5,"IBH":6,"LAW":7,"TS26":8};
function ShouldFilter(cardID,filter) {
  var filterArr = filter.match(/(?:[^\s"]+|"[^"]*")+/g) || [];
  for(var i=0; i<filterArr.length; ++i) {
    var operand = '';
    var operandArr = [':', '=', '<', '>', '<=', '>='];
    for(var j=0; j<operandArr.length; ++j) {
      if(filterArr[i].includes(operandArr[j])) {
        operand = operandArr[j];
      }
    }
    var thisFilter = "";
    var thisValue = "";
    if(operand == '') {
      thisFilter = "title";
      thisValue = filterArr[i];
    } else {
      var thisFilterArr = filterArr[i].split(operand);
      var thisFilter = thisFilterArr[0].toLowerCase();
      var thisValue = thisFilterArr[1];
    }
    if(thisValue && thisValue.length >= 2 && thisValue[0] === '"' && thisValue[thisValue.length-1] === '"') {
      thisValue = thisValue.slice(1, -1);
    }
    if(thisValue == "") continue;
    var _filterAliases = {t:"text",p:"power",tr:"trait",up:"upgradepower",uhp:"upgradehp",r:"rarity",a:"arena"};
    if(_filterAliases[thisFilter]) thisFilter = _filterAliases[thisFilter];
    switch(thisFilter) {
      case "title":
        var propertyValue = Cardtitle(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null || !propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        break;
      case "subtitle":
        var propertyValue = Cardsubtitle(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null || !propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        break;
      case "cardnumber":
        if(operand == '=' && CardcardNumber(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == ':' && CardcardNumber(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>' && CardcardNumber(cardID) <= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<' && CardcardNumber(cardID) >= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>=' && CardcardNumber(cardID) < parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<=' && CardcardNumber(cardID) > parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        break;
      case "cost":
        if(operand == '=' && Cardcost(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == ':' && Cardcost(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>' && Cardcost(cardID) <= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<' && Cardcost(cardID) >= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>=' && Cardcost(cardID) < parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<=' && Cardcost(cardID) > parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        break;
      case "hp":
        if(operand == '=' && Cardhp(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == ':' && Cardhp(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>' && Cardhp(cardID) <= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<' && Cardhp(cardID) >= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>=' && Cardhp(cardID) < parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<=' && Cardhp(cardID) > parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        break;
      case "power":
        if(operand == '=' && Cardpower(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == ':' && Cardpower(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>' && Cardpower(cardID) <= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<' && Cardpower(cardID) >= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>=' && Cardpower(cardID) < parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<=' && Cardpower(cardID) > parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        break;
      case "text":
        var propertyValue = Cardtext(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null || !propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        break;
      case "unique":
        var propertyValue = Cardunique(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null || !propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        break;
      case "upgradehp":
        if(operand == '=' && CardupgradeHp(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == ':' && CardupgradeHp(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>' && CardupgradeHp(cardID) <= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<' && CardupgradeHp(cardID) >= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>=' && CardupgradeHp(cardID) < parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<=' && CardupgradeHp(cardID) > parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        break;
      case "upgradepower":
        if(operand == '=' && CardupgradePower(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == ':' && CardupgradePower(cardID) != parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>' && CardupgradePower(cardID) <= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<' && CardupgradePower(cardID) >= parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '>=' && CardupgradePower(cardID) < parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        else if(operand == '<=' && CardupgradePower(cardID) > parseInt(thisValue)) return true;
        break;
      case "aspect":
        var propertyValue = Cardaspect(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null || !propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        break;
      case "trait":
        var propertyValue = Cardtrait(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null || !propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        break;
      case "arena":
        var propertyValue = Cardarena(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null || !propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        break;
      case "type":
        var propertyValue = Cardtype(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null || !propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        break;
      case "rarity":
        var propertyValue = Cardrarity(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null || !propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        break;
      case "set":
        var propertyValue = Cardset(cardID);
        if(propertyValue == null) return true;
        if(Object.keys(allSetsData).length === 0 || operand === '=' || operand === ':') {
          if(!propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
        } else {
          var targetOrder = allSetsData[thisValue.toUpperCase()];
          var cardOrder = allSetsData[propertyValue.toUpperCase()];
          if(targetOrder === undefined || cardOrder === undefined) {
            if(!propertyValue.toLowerCase().includes(thisValue.toLowerCase())) return true;
          } else if(operand == '>' && cardOrder <= targetOrder) return true;
          else if(operand == '<' && cardOrder >= targetOrder) return true;
          else if(operand == '>=' && cardOrder < targetOrder) return true;
          else if(operand == '<=' && cardOrder > targetOrder) return true;
        }
        break;
      case "specificcards":
        var cardArr = thisValue.split(',');
        if(cardArr.indexOf(cardID) === -1) return true;
        break;
      case "c":
        var _aspectColorMap = {b:"Vigilance",g:"Command",r:"Aggression",y:"Cunning",w:"Heroism",k:"Villainy"};
        var _pv = Cardaspect(cardID);
        if(_pv == null) return true;
        for(var _ci = 0; _ci < thisValue.length; ++_ci) {
          var _fa = _aspectColorMap[thisValue[_ci].toLowerCase()];
          if(_fa && !_pv.toLowerCase().includes(_fa.toLowerCase())) return true;
        }
        break;
      default: break;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

var propertyLookup = [
  { "Name": "title", "Type": "string" },
  { "Name": "subtitle", "Type": "string" },
  { "Name": "cardNumber", "Type": "number" },
  { "Name": "cost", "Type": "number" },
  { "Name": "hp", "Type": "number" },

  { "Name": "type", "Type": "string" },
  { "Name": "rarity", "Type": "string" },

];

  global $titleData;

}

function CardCardNumber($cardID) {
  global $cardNumberData;
  return isset($cardNumberData[$cardID]) ? $cardNumberData[$cardID] : null;
}

function CardPower($cardID) {
  global $powerData;
  return isset($powerData[$cardID]) ? $powerData[$cardID] : null;
}

function CardText($cardID) {
  global $textData;
  return isset($textData[$cardID]) ? $textData[$cardID] : null;
}

function CardUnique($cardID) {
  global $uniqueData;
  return isset($uniqueData[$cardID]) ? $uniqueData[$cardID] : null;
}

}

function CardSet($cardID) {
  global $setData;
  return isset($setData[$cardID]) ? $setData[$cardID] : null;
}
